    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages

    O

    Offer - Class in exchange
    It implements the offers
    Offer(int, LocalDate, RegisteredClient, RegisteredClient, ArrayList, ArrayList, OfferStatus) - Constructor for class exchange.Offer
    An offer's general constructor
    Offer(LocalDate, RegisteredClient, RegisteredClient, ArrayList, ArrayList, OfferStatus) - Constructor for class exchange.Offer
    The offer's complete constructor (without id)
    Offer(RegisteredClient, RegisteredClient) - Constructor for class exchange.Offer
    The offer's constructor when products aren't specified
    Offer(RegisteredClient, RegisteredClient, ArrayList, ArrayList) - Constructor for class exchange.Offer
    The offer's constructor when products are specified
    OfferHistory - Class in exchange
    Description: It implements the offer history
    OfferHistory(Set, RegisteredClient) - Constructor for class exchange.OfferHistory
    The offer history's complete constructor
    OfferHistory(RegisteredClient) - Constructor for class exchange.OfferHistory
    It creates an empty offer history
    OfferStatus - Enum Class in exchange
    It defines the offer's possible statuses
    order - package order
    It includes everything order-unique.
    Order - Class in order
    It implements the order paid by the client
    Order(double, OrderState, List, List, RegisteredClient) - Constructor for class order.Order
    Creates an order for when it hasn't been picked up
    Order(int, double, OrderState, List, List, RegisteredClient) - Constructor for class order.Order
    Creates an order for when it hasn't been picked up
    ORDER - Enum constant in enum class notification.NotificationType
    Notifications related to orders
    ORDER - Enum constant in enum class user.Permission
    Permission to perform order actions
    OrderHistory - Class in order
    It implements the order history of the registered client
    OrderHistory(RegisteredClient) - Constructor for class order.OrderHistory
    Creates an order history
    OrderPermission - Class in user
    It implements the permission that allows an employee to manage Orders
    OrderPermission(boolean) - Constructor for class user.OrderPermission
    Constructor for an order permission
    OrderState - Enum Class in order
    It defines the order's possible states
